conservative.name: The Sleep of Morr
conservative.requirements: 4 favour, +1 favour per character in target engagement within medium range. Must perform the prepare manoeuvre

success.description: As above, and the living targets with fatigue (or wounds if they do not track fatigue) in excess of their Willpower fall into a normal slumber. Undead targets with wounds in excess of their Willpower are destroyed

success.description: As above, and the living targets with fatigue (or wounds if they do not track fatigue) in excess of their Willpower fall into a normal slumber. Undead targets with wounds in excess of their Willpower are destroyed
